name: TREX CO INC
summary: Trex Co Inc is a manufacturer of wood-alternative decking, railing, and outdoor living products. The company produces composite decking and railing made from reclaimed wood and recycled plastic film, marketed under the Trex brand. Trex products are sold through a network of distributors and retailers for residential and commercial outdoor applications.
